# Test non-JSON input handling
#
# This test verifies that mcpspy can handle non-JSON input gracefully

# Define test files first
-- non_json_input.txt --
This is not JSON
This is another line
This has some {braces} but isn't valid JSON

# Test with input that isn't JSON formatted
cat non_json_input.txt | mcpspy -f output.log -v
! stderr "error"

# Verify that colored output works with non-JSON content
stderr "\033\\[32m" # Green color code for recv messages

# Verify that non-JSON input is processed line by line
cat output.log
grep "mcp-recv This is not JSON" output.log
grep "mcp-recv This is another line" output.log
! grep "  \"method\": " output.log  # Should not have pretty printing

# Count the number of parsed lines
grep -c "mcp-recv" output.log
stdout 3  # Should be 3 lines
